name: ima-copilot
description: > Installs, troubleshoots, and personalizes the official Tencent IMA skill (a wrapper layer that orchestrates upstream ima-skill, not a replacement). Use when the user mentions IMA, 腾讯 IMA, ima.qq.com, ima-skill, installing or configuring ima-skill, IMA API key / credentials, searching across IMA knowledge bases, 知识库搜索, 笔记搜索, fan-out search with preferred KBs / priority boosting, or wants to diagnose, repair, or personalize an ima-skill install. Also trigger on the missing-YAML-frontmatter bug i
author: daymade
